character_buff.name: Heroic Instinct
character_buff.description: Heighten the body and mind to perfect unison, allowing for a limit break. Lasts until your location changes.

effects: Skill damage increases by (1% of extra [STR]) additionally
At Lv. 12, stats gained from accessories x2

stances.name: Barisada

skills.name: Layered
skills.description: Improves combat efficiency by embodying the legendary sword [Barisada]. Lasts until your location changes.

skills.name: Kira
skills.description: Quickly defeat nearby enemies. After using the skill, when reusing [Kira] [Pales] [Kaleidor] [Prea], casts [Kira Smash] [Kira Strike] [Kira Slash] [Kira Burst].

effects: [Kira Smash] Ignoring enemys DEF by 60, Ignoring Blocking, 50% chance to [Stun], Extra ignoring DEF of [Neutralized] PC in proportion to [STR][A.R.]
[Kira Strike] Ignoring enemys DEF by 60, Ignoring Evasion, 50% chance to [Armor Crasher], Extra ignoring DEF of [Neutralized] PC in proportion to [STR][A.R.]
[Kira Slash] Ignoring enemys DEF by 60, 50% chance to [Slow] enemy, Extra ignoring DEF of [Neutralized] PC in proportion to [STR][A.R.]
[Kira Burst] Ignoring enemys DEF by 60, 50% chance to [Heat], Extra ignoring DEF of [Neutralized] PC in proportion to [STR][A.R.]

skills.name: Pales
skills.description: Break the enemy ahead and cut it twice. After using the skill, when reusing [Pales], casts [Pales Crash].
skills.target: Up to 7 enemies, 11m in front, within 6m width

effects: In Skill Casting/Accuracy, [Barisadas Fighting Spirit] increases
[Pales Crash] Ignores enemys DEF by 60, Ignores Evasion, 50% chance to impose [Panic] on enemy, Extra ignores DEF of PC enemy in [Neutralized] state in proportion to [STR][A.R.]
Damage to Evasion type enemies +1% per 1 evasion

skills.name: Kaleidor

skills.name: Prea
skills.description: Releases accumulated Fighting Spirit of Barisada to the front enemy and destroys them. Possible to use only in [Holy Sword] state.
skills.target: Up to 36 enemies, 23m in the front and at an angle of 90 degrees

effects: The more targets, the more damage
The more targets, the more damage

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 8% of extra [STR]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 3% DMG according to extra [STR]
Ignore additional DEF according to extra [STR] * 4
Additional DMG against Monster according to 3 * 50
